goals.title: The Glowing Skin Tea Stack
goals.h1: Glowing skin from the inside — the tea ritual
goals.lede: Ancient Ayurveda paired collagen-supporting spices with warm tea long before peptides had a name. Modern science measured what worked.
avoid: coffee right before or after collagen (tannins)
stirring collagen into very hot brews (poor mixing)

faq.a: Tea provides hydration plus polyphenols that support collagen synthesis. Time it right and you avoid tannin interference.

faq.q: Can the tea denature collagen peptides?
faq.a: Hydrolyzed peptides are stable at brewing temperatures. The bigger issue is tannins binding protein - space your collagen and your strongest cup of tea by 30 minutes if you can.

faq.q: How long until I see results?
faq.a: Skin endpoints in clinical studies typically appear at 8-12 weeks of daily 10g+ collagen intake.

goals.title: The Better Sleep Tea Stack
goals.h1: Sleep ritual: warming spices that quiet the nervous system
goals.lede: Ancient Ayurveda used warming spices to settle agni at dusk. Modern science calls them adaptogens.

evening_blend.add_in: 1 tsp warm milk or oat milk

faq.a: Ashwagandha is a calming adaptogen shown to reduce cortisol when taken consistently for 60+ days.
Yes - the evening blend uses an herbal base with zero caffeine.

faq.q: Can I drink this with sleep medication?
faq.a: Check with your doctor. Adaptogens can interact with sedatives.

goals.title: The Sustained Energy Tea Stack
goals.h1: Energy without the crash - real caffeine, real ritual
goals.lede: Real caffeine from real tea leaves - sustained, not jittery. The ancient form had this right.

morning_blend.add_in: 1 tsp ghee or coconut oil for sustained release

faq.q: How is this different from coffee energy?
faq.a: Tea L-theanine smooths caffeine release - alert without the spike-and-crash.
Lipids slow caffeine absorption, extending the alert window from 2 hours to 4-5.
Yes - 10g collagen peptides pair well with this blend if added after the brew cools to 80 deg C.

goals.title: The Daily Immunity Tea Stack
goals.lede: Tradition meets evidence: ginger, turmeric, and tulsi. Three molecules. One ritual.

faq.a: Curcumin needs piperine (black pepper) to multiply bioavailability ~20x. Always pair them.
Daily - adaptogens work on consistency, not crisis dosing.
Reduce dose by half for ages 8+. Skip for under 8.

goals.title: The Stress Relief Tea Stack
goals.lede: Ayurveda discovered the molecule. Science measured the cortisol drop. We put the ritual back.

faq.a: Cortisol shifts take 4-8 weeks of daily intake to measure clinically.
Yes - the warm cup is itself a transition cue. Pair with 4-7-8 breathing.
Tulsi and rhodiola can interact with SSRIs. Ask your doctor first.
